policy: All production dependencies require: (1) OSI-compatible license check, (2) CVE scan via Trivy + OSV, (3) maintenance-status review (last release within 18 months or LTS commitment), (4) dependency_manager_agent sign-off recorded here before merge.
review_cadence: Monthly automated rescan; immediate review triggered on any CRITICAL/HIGH CVE advisory.

packages.name: github.com/gin-gonic/gin
packages.notes: Primary HTTP framework. Well-maintained, high adoption, minimal surface area.

packages.name: github.com/gin-contrib/cors
packages.notes: Official Gin CORS middleware.

packages.name: github.com/gin-contrib/gzip
packages.notes: Response compression middleware.

packages.name: github.com/gin-contrib/requestid
packages.notes: Injects X-Request-ID header for distributed tracing correlation.

packages.name: gorm.io/gorm
packages.notes: Primary ORM. Used for all PostgreSQL interactions except raw migration scripts.

packages.name: gorm.io/driver/postgres
packages.notes: GORM PostgreSQL driver backed by pgx.

packages.name: github.com/jackc/pgx/v5
packages.notes: Low-level PostgreSQL driver; used directly for bulk operations and LISTEN/NOTIFY.

packages.name: github.com/redis/go-redis/v9
packages.notes: Redis client for caching and pub/sub. v9 is the current stable line.

packages.name: github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/v4
packages.notes: SQL schema migration tool. Migrations live in db/migrations/ and run at service startup.

packages.name: github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5
packages.notes: JWT creation and validation. v5 includes fix for GHSA-2c7c-3mj9-8ppk (go-jose).

packages.name: golang.org/x/crypto
packages.notes: Patched for CVE-2023-48795 (Terrapin). Used for bcrypt password hashing and SSH.

packages.name: go.opentelemetry.io/otel
packages.notes: OpenTelemetry core API. Traces exported to Jaeger via OTLP/HTTP.

packages.name: go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk
packages.notes: OTel SDK — tracer provider, sampler configuration.

packages.name: go.opentelemetry.io/otel/exporters/otlp/otlptrace/otlptracehttp
packages.notes: OTLP HTTP trace exporter.

packages.name: go.opentelemetry.io/contrib/instrumentation/github.com/gin-gonic/gin/otelgin
packages.notes: Auto-instrumentation middleware for Gin.

packages.name: go.opentelemetry.io/contrib/instrumentation/google.golang.org/grpc/otelgrpc
packages.notes: Auto-instrumentation interceptors for gRPC.

packages.name: github.com/prometheus/client_golang
packages.notes: Prometheus metrics exposition.

packages.name: go.uber.org/zap
packages.notes: Structured logging. JSON encoder in production; console encoder in development.

packages.name: github.com/spf13/viper
packages.notes: Configuration management. Reads env vars, config files, and Vault secrets.

packages.name: google.golang.org/grpc
packages.notes: gRPC framework for inter-service and agent communication.

packages.name: google.golang.org/protobuf
packages.notes: Patched for CVE-2024-24786 (infinite loop). Required version >= 1.33.0.

packages.name: github.com/grpc-ecosystem/grpc-gateway/v2
packages.notes: gRPC-Gateway for REST-to-gRPC transcoding at the API gateway layer.

packages.name: github.com/go-playground/validator/v10
packages.notes: Request struct validation. Used via Gin's built-in binding.

packages.name: github.com/google/uuid
packages.notes: UUID v4/v7 generation for entity IDs.

packages.name: github.com/joho/godotenv
packages.notes: Loads .env files in development mode only. Viper handles production secrets.

packages.name: github.com/hashicorp/go-retryablehttp
packages.notes: Retryable HTTP client with jitter for webhook and registry calls.

packages.name: github.com/stretchr/testify
packages.notes: Test assertion and mock library. Test-only dependency.

packages.name: github.com/testcontainers/testcontainers-go
packages.notes: Integration test containers for PostgreSQL and Redis. Test-only dependency.

packages.name: go.uber.org/mock
packages.notes: mockgen successor. Generates type-safe mocks from interfaces.

packages.name: github.com/samber/lo
packages.notes: Generic utility functions (Map, Filter, Find, etc.). Replaces manual slice loops.

packages.name: github.com/docker/docker
packages.notes: Moby/Docker Engine SDK. Pinned at v26.1.4 to patch CVE-2024-29018. The +incompatible suffix is expected for this module path.

packages.name: github.com/docker/go-connections
packages.notes: Docker connection utilities (TLS helpers, port bindings).

packages.name: github.com/docker/distribution
packages.notes: OCI image distribution types used as transitive dep of Moby SDK.

packages.name: github.com/opencontainers/image-spec
packages.notes: OCI image specification types.

packages.name: github.com/gorilla/websocket
packages.notes: WebSocket implementation for container exec streaming and log tailing.

packages.name: github.com/google/go-containerregistry
packages.notes: Go library for OCI/Docker registry operations (pull, push, inspect layers).

packages.name: github.com/aquasecurity/trivy-db
packages.notes: Trivy vulnerability DB types. Used with the Trivy sidecar server; DB updates handled by sidecar cron, not embedded.

packages.name: github.com/apparentlymart/go-cidr
packages.notes: CIDR / subnet calculation utilities. Stable library; no new features needed.

packages.name: github.com/klauspost/compress
packages.notes: High-performance compression for volume backup archives.

packages.name: github.com/mholt/archiver/v4
packages.notes: Multi-format archiver (tar, zip, gz). Alpha version accepted because v3 is deprecated and v4 stable is not released yet. Review when v4.0.0 stable ships.

packages.name: github.com/prometheus/prometheus
packages.notes: Embedded TSDB for short-term metrics ring buffer. Only the tsdb sub-package is imported.

packages.name: github.com/nxadm/tail
packages.notes: File tail library for reading rotated Docker log files from disk.

packages.name: github.com/grafana/loki
packages.notes: Only the pkg/push sub-package is imported for Loki push API types. AGPL-3.0 license is acceptable for internal server-side use (no distribution of DCMS as a product to customers under AGPL terms). Legal reviewed: approved for internal deployment. Do NOT embed in any client-distributed binary.

packages.name: github.com/wneessen/go-mail
packages.notes: SMTP email client with TLS support.

packages.name: github.com/slack-go/slack
packages.notes: Slack Web API client for alert delivery.

packages.name: github.com/melbahja/goph
packages.notes: SSH client for remote Docker host provisioning and health checks.

packages.name: github.com/caddyserver/certmagic
packages.notes: Automatic TLS certificate management for agent mTLS communication.

packages.name: github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3
packages.notes: System resource metrics (CPU, memory, disk) for agent heartbeat reporting.

packages.name: golang.org/x/net
packages.notes: Patched for CVE-2023-44487 (HTTP/2 Rapid Reset). Minimum version enforced.

packages.name: react
packages.notes: Core UI library. React 18 concurrent features used for Suspense boundaries and streaming.

packages.name: react-dom
packages.notes: React DOM renderer. Must match react version exactly.

packages.name: typescript
packages.notes: Strict TypeScript. tsconfig sets strict: true, noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true.

packages.name: vite
packages.notes: Build tool and dev server. Replaces CRA. HMR for fast development iteration.

packages.name: @vitejs/plugin-react
packages.notes: Official React plugin for Vite. Uses SWC transform for faster builds.

packages.name: tailwindcss
packages.notes: Utility-first CSS framework. JIT mode enabled. Tailwind v4 is not yet stable.

packages.name: @tanstack/react-query
packages.notes: Server-state management. Handles caching, background refetch, and optimistic updates.

packages.name: zustand
packages.notes: Lightweight client-state management. Used for UI state (sidebar, theme, filters).

packages.name: recharts
packages.notes: Composable chart library built on D3. Used for CPU, memory, and network sparklines.

packages.name: react-router-dom
packages.notes: Client-side routing. Data router pattern with loaders and actions.

packages.name: axios
packages.notes: HTTP client. Patched for GHSA-2c7c-3mj9-8ppk (SSRF). Version >= 1.7.2 required.

packages.name: zod
packages.notes: Runtime type validation and schema parsing. Used with react-hook-form resolvers.

packages.name: react-hook-form
packages.notes: Performant form state management with minimal re-renders.

packages.name: @radix-ui/react-dialog
packages.notes: Accessible headless dialog primitive. WAI-ARIA compliant.

packages.name: lucide-react
packages.notes: Icon library. Tree-shakeable SVG icons.

packages.name: xterm
packages.notes: Terminal emulator for container exec (attach) feature.

packages.name: reconnecting-websocket
packages.notes: Auto-reconnecting WebSocket wrapper for real-time log streaming.

packages.name: date-fns
packages.notes: Date manipulation utilities. Tree-shakeable; replaces moment.js.

packages.name: msw
packages.notes: Mock Service Worker for API mocking in tests and Storybook. Dev/test only.

packages.name: vitest
packages.notes: Vite-native unit test runner. Replaces Jest.

packages.name: @testing-library/react
packages.notes: Component testing utilities. Encourages testing user behaviour, not implementation.

packages.name: @playwright/test
packages.notes: E2E browser testing. Chromium, Firefox, WebKit. Runs in CI on PR.

packages.name: eslint
packages.notes: JavaScript/TypeScript linter. Flat config format (eslint.config.js).

packages.name: prettier
packages.notes: Opinionated code formatter. CI blocks PRs with formatting violations.

rejected_packages.name: github.com/dgrijalva/jwt-go
rejected_packages.reason: Unmaintained since 2020. CVE-2020-26160 (JWT validation bypass) — never patched by author.

rejected_packages.name: github.com/iris-contrib/httpexpect
rejected_packages.reason: Tightly coupled to Iris framework which is not in our stack. Redundant with testify + testcontainers approach.

rejected_packages.name: github.com/astaxie/beego
rejected_packages.reason: Monolithic framework that conflicts with Gin. Maintenance transferred to beego/beego but activity is declining. Not suitable for microservice architecture.

rejected_packages.name: moment
rejected_packages.reason: Declared legacy/maintenance-only by its own maintainers since 2020. Large bundle size (72 kB minified+gzip). Mutable API causes subtle bugs.

rejected_packages.name: lodash
rejected_packages.reason: CommonJS-only main package cannot be tree-shaken by Vite. Results in full 71 kB bundle import if any sub-import is missed.

rejected_packages.name: node-fetch
rejected_packages.reason: Redundant. Vite targets modern browsers with native fetch. The Axios package is already approved for cases requiring interceptors.

rejected_packages.name: github.com/nicholasgasior/gsfmt
rejected_packages.reason: Unmaintained since 2018. Last commit 6 years ago. No OSS security audit. Functionality covered by go.uber.org/zap.

rejected_packages.name: github.com/fatih/structs
rejected_packages.reason: Archived by author in 2022. Uses unsafe reflection patterns. Functionality available via encoding/json or samber/lo.

rejected_packages.name: react-scripts
rejected_packages.reason: Create React App is in maintenance mode since 2023. No Vite support. Slow builds, outdated webpack config, no ESM output.

rejected_packages.name: @mui/material
rejected_packages.reason: Large bundle size conflicts with Tailwind CSS design token approach. Using both leads to style specificity conflicts and duplicated CSS reset logic. Radix UI primitives + Tailwind is the approved design system.
